expr: (() => ({ staticHero: document.body.classList.contains('static-hero'), story: document.body.classList.contains('js-story'), canvasDisplay: getComputedStyle(document.getElementById('hero-canvas')).display, heroImgVisible: getComputedStyle(document.querySelector('.static-hero-img')).display, contentVisible: !!document.querySelector('.panel'), faq: document.querySelectorAll('.faq details').length }))()
